name: remove_port
short_description: Remove the given list of top ports from the netlist.
full_help:
remove_port

Description: 
Remove the given list of top ports from the netlist.

Syntax: 
remove_port  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ports>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ports>     Ports and/or bus ports to remove

Categories: 
PinPlanning

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
